title: Resolve source-routing rule: SRD4: TT stress / quadrupole
description: Route: TT stress / quadrupole -> h_TT. Allowed condition: radiative/tensor content is routed to tensor sector without duplicating ordinary scalar mass charge. Forbidden condition: TT stress becomes H_curv/H_exch source, dark patch, or scalar correction by convenience. Consequence: tensor/radiative routing remains separate from ordinary exterior mass charge..
